fields.helpText: This is the LOINC SUBJECT MATTER DOMAIN axis, which characterizes the  subject matter and/or discipline that is relevant to the document being  considered (e.g., Cardiology, Primary Care, Radiology, etc.).

This is an alternate expression for the Subject Matter Domain.    NOTE: These terms are for the initial mapping process only. The mapping process is a one time exercise until all existing active titles are mapped to a standard title.  This field will NOT be used to deploy data thru MFS. This field will not be updated after the initial installation. The  alternate expression does not have to be stored in VISTA separately from  the standard title.  It will be stored in the terminology server. The
This field identifies the Master entry for a VUID associated with a  Term/Concept.
VHA Unique ID (VUID). A unique meaningless integer assigned to reference terms VHA wide.
Describes the pair Status and Effective Date/Time for each reference term.
